scripts.spec:convert: sed -i '' 's/{{scheme}}:\/\/{{host}}/http:\/\/localhost/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/{{host}}/localhost/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/{{scheme}}/http/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/{{password}}/password/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/"localhost\//"http:\/\/localhost\//g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/<Chat GUID>/:chatGuid/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/<GUID>/:guid/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/<Handle Address>/:handleAddress/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/<ID>/:id/g' postman-collection.json && sed -i '' 's/<Uploaded Attachment UUID>/:attachmentUuid/g' postman-collection.json && ./node_modules/.bin/postman-to-openapi -s postman-collection.json -o openapi.yaml && sed -i '' 's/:chatGuid/{chatGuid}/g' openapi.yaml && sed -i '' 's/:guid/{guid}/g' openapi.yaml && sed -i '' 's/:handleAddress/{handleAddress}/g' openapi.yaml && sed -i '' 's/:id/{id}/g' openapi.yaml && sed -i '' 's/:attachmentUuid/{attachmentUuid}/g' openapi.yaml && python3 fix_spec.py && python3 fix_spec_ops.py
scripts.build: npm run spec:download && npm run spec:convert && npm run generate && tsc
